description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a modern, urban design. The shoes have a predominantly white and black color scheme, with teal accents on the tongue, heel, and side logo. The upper is constructed from perforated synthetic material for breathability, while the toe and heel areas are reinforced with darker overlays. The laces are black and follow a standard criss-cross pattern, and the midsole includes a teal stripe for added visual interest. The heel area displays a circular teal logo, and the shoes appear clean and structurally intact. The overall build suggests comfort and durability, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A pair of modern, low-top athletic sneakers in white, black, and teal with perforated uppers and teal logo accents. The shoes are clean, sturdy, and designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black laces, perforated white uppers, and teal accents on the tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the perforated panels, teal side logo, and teal-striped midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the teal logo on the heel and the teal-striped heel counter.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the perforated panels, teal logo, and midsole details.
attribute_logo: circular teal logo on the side and heel
